result.reasoning: The user asks for the title of a Grand Prize-winning Pillsbury Bake-Off recipe from before 2020 that can be made by using one ingredient from each of three friends. The ingredients are: user provides chicken and turkey; friend 1 provides spinach and arugula; friend 2 provides canned biscuit dough and canned pizza dough. We must pick one from each friend and find a recipe matching those three ingredients that is a grand prize winner before 2020. From the tool call history, step_1 returned a detailed result for "Chicken and Spinach Biscuit Gyros," which is explicitly stated as the Pillsbury Bake-Off Grand Prize Winner for Contest 46 (2013). This recipe uses chicken (from user), spinach (from friend 1), and refrigerated biscuit dough (from friend 2). This matches one ingredient from each friend. Step_2 found no grand prize winner for turkey-arugula-pizza dough combination. Step_3 lists all grand prize winners before 2020; only "Chicken and Spinach Biscuit Gyros" (2013) fits the selected ingredient combination. Therefore, the answer is the recipe title. The authoritative casing is preserved from the source.
